details.description: Evening waterfront scene in Hoi An with the river in the foreground reflecting countless colorful lanterns and warm yellow lights from the opposite bank. Low wooden passenger boats with lanterns (sampans) carry visitors; one boat shows a code (HA016). The far bank is lined with historic two‑story shophouses painted the characteristic Hoi An yellow, with timber shutters, tiled pitched roofs, and strings of multi‑colored hanging lanterns. Cafes and restaurants open to the promenade are busy with people. The sky is deep blue at dusk with some clouds, and the overall atmosphere is festive due to the lantern illumination and their rippling reflections on the water.

details.description: Nighttime riverside scene in Hoi An Old Town along the Hoai River. Warm yellow and red lanterns line the two-story traditional shophouses, their glow reflecting on the water. A line of boats with lanterns glides along the river, while pedestrians stroll the promenade under a dark blue sky. The architecture features tiled roofs with curved eaves, wooden beams, and shuttered windows, typical of Hoi An's historic waterfront. The atmosphere is festive and tranquil, suggesting a busy evening in a heritage district with lantern-lit charm. The overall composition emphasizes the contrast between illuminated facades and the twilight, with the river acting as a mirror for the glowing lanterns.

details.description: Twilight riverside scene in Hoi An, Vietnam. Low, yellow-plastered heritage shophouses line the waterfront, strung with multicolored lanterns that glow warmly and reflect in the calm river. Cafes and small shops face a promenade shaded by trees, while wooden sampan boats carrying passengers and decorative lanterns drift in the foreground. The sky is deep blue after sunset and the water shimmers with the lantern lights.

details.description: Night riverside scene in Hoi An Ancient Town, Vietnam. A row of traditional two-story shophouses lines the water’s edge, their façades illuminated by warm yellow lights and colorful lanterns that hang along the eaves. Boats with glowing lanterns glide on the Hoai River, creating shimmering reflections on the rippling surface. The promenade is lively with people strolling and dining, while strings of lanterns extend along the riverbank, contributing to a festive, historic atmosphere characteristic of Hoi An at night.

details.description: A vibrant nighttime view of the Hoai River waterfront in Hoi An Ancient Town. The foreground is dominated by the dark, rippling water of the river, reflecting streaks of yellow, red, and orange light. A traditional wooden tourist boat with the registration number "HA 016" is navigating the water, carrying passengers wearing orange life jackets under a canopy. The background features the bustling riverfront promenade, likely Bach Dang Street, lined with traditional two-story shophouses characterized by their yellow walls and tiled roofs. The scene is illuminated by warm streetlights and numerous colorful silk lanterns hanging from trees and building facades, creating the signature festive atmosphere of this UNESCO World Heritage site.

details.description: A nighttime scene of the Hoai River in Hoi An, Vietnam. The image captures the vibrant atmosphere of the ancient town after dark, with traditional wooden sampan boats carrying tourists on the water. The riverbank is lined with historic yellow-walled buildings featuring dark tiled roofs, typical of the local architectural style. These buildings and the boats are decorated with numerous glowing, colorful silk lanterns in shades of red, yellow, and blue. The artificial lights from the lanterns and buildings create long, shimmering reflections across the surface of the dark river. The sky is a deep twilight blue, suggesting it is early evening.

details.description: Evening riverside scene with yellow-plastered two‑story shophouses illuminated by strings of multicolored lanterns. The buildings have wooden shutters and balconies typical of Hoi An’s historic trading-port architecture. A promenade lined with trees and restaurants runs along the water. In the river, small wooden sampan boats carry passengers wearing life jackets; several boats display glowing decorative lanterns, and the lights reflect vividly on the water under a deep blue dusk sky.

details.description: Nighttime canal scene in a traditional Chinese water town. A row of two-story, timber-framed shop houses lines the water’s edge, their façades warmly lit by rows of red and yellow lanterns. The calm canal mirrors the glowing lanterns in shimmering reflections. On the promenade, people stroll and cyclists pause near storefronts, while a boat with a canopy and colorful lanterns glides along the water. The overall atmosphere is festive and culturally rich, with classic architecture, hanging lanterns, and a busy riverside ambiance.

details.description: Nighttime canal scene in a traditional Chinese water town. A row of two-story buildings with dark tiled roofs lines the water’s edge, their façades glowing from warm yellow and red lanterns that hang along eaves and balconies. The lanterns create shimmering reflections on the rippling canal. Several boats with passengers and lanterns glide or drift on the water, while people stroll along the waterfront promenade and bicycles and shopfronts are visible. The deep blue sky contrasts with the festive, glow-filled streetscape, conveying a lively yet tranquil evening atmosphere.

details.description: A vibrant night scene capturing the waterfront of Hoi An Ancient Town in Vietnam. The view looks across the dark, rippling waters of the Thu Bon River (or Hoai River tributary), which reflects the warm glow of streetlights and colorful silk lanterns in streaks of yellow, orange, and red. Along the riverbank, traditional yellow-walled shophouses with tiled roofs are visible, bustling with activity and illuminated by strings of lanterns. In the center foreground, a traditional wooden tourist boat with the registration number "HA 016" navigates the water, carrying passengers wearing orange life vests. The sky is a deep twilight blue.

details.description: A nighttime view of the waterfront in Hội An Ancient Town, Vietnam. The scene features traditional two-story buildings with yellow-ochre walls and dark tiled roofs, densely decorated with numerous glowing colorful lanterns in shades of red, yellow, blue, and green. The buildings house shops and restaurants, with people visible on the balconies and along the riverside walkway. In the foreground, the dark waters of the Thu Bồn River reflect the vibrant lights from the shore. Several small wooden sampan boats are on the water, one of which is prominently featured with passengers and a registration number 'HA 016'. The sky is a deep twilight blue.
